'''yasulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loach|loach]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-s-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loach|loach]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yasulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæsilith|yæsilith]] || [[word:yæsilij|yæsilij]] || [[word:yæsilish|yæsilish]] || [[word:yæsili|yæsili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yasusuluth|yasusuluth]] || [[word:yasusuluj|yasusuluj]] || [[word:yasusulush|yasusulush]] || [[word:yasusulu|yasusulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yasuluth|yasuluth]] || [[word:yasuluj|yasuluj]] || [[word:yasulush|yasulush]] || [[word:yasulu|yasulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yasufluth|yasufluth]] || [[word:yasufluj|yasufluj]] || [[word:yasuflush|yasuflush]] || [[word:yasufluf|yasufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yasuluthu|yasuluthu]] || [[word:yasuluju|yasuluju]] || [[word:yasulushu|yasulushu]] || [[word:yasuluku|yasuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yasuluth|yasuluth]] || [[word:yasuluj|yasuluj]] || [[word:yasulush|yasulush]] || [[word:yasulu|yasulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yasuluthul|yasuluthul]] || [[word:yasulujul|yasulujul]] || [[word:yasulushul|yasulushul]] || [[word:yasulukul|yasulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yasuluthuthu|yasuluthuthu]] || [[word:yasulujuju|yasulujuju]] || [[word:yasulushushu|yasulushushu]] || [[word:yasuluku|yasuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yasuluthun|yasuluthun]] || [[word:yasulujun|yasulujun]] || [[word:yasulushun|yasulushun]] || [[word:yasulukun|yasulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yasuluthuoro|yasuluthuoro]] || [[word:yasulujuoro|yasulujuoro]] || [[word:yasulushuoro|yasulushuoro]] || [[word:yasulukuoro|yasulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
